description: A designed news-collage card combining a White House photo with overlaid headline clippings on a dark navy background. The top photo shows President Trump in a dark blue suit and red tie standing in an ornate White House room (fireplace, decorative urns, a Marine in dress uniform at right) reaching down to place his hand on the shoulder of a smiling young Black student in a blazer with a red tie and a presidential-seal patch; another smiling student sits at left. Across the middle, large white typography reads 'Putting Students FIRST!' (with 'Putting Students' in italic serif and 'FIRST!' in bold). Beneath are three torn-paper headline clippings each carrying a media logo: Fox News ('Power stripped from Education Department in latest Trump administration move to dismantle it'), EdNC ('U.S. Department of Education moves many programs to other agencies to break up federal bureaucracy'), and NPR ('Trump moves closer to closing the Education Department').
notable_text: Putting Students FIRST! / Power stripped from Education Department in latest Trump administration move to dismantle it / U.S. Department of Education moves many programs to other agencies 'to break up federal bureaucracy' / Trump moves closer to closing the Education Department
